title: Cyborg Robot Chicken: Returns
description: Your reign of terror against all chickens ends now, The Cyber Robot Chicken has come from the future to strike you down once and for all!
body:
![CYBORG ROBOT CHICKEN RETURNS](https://i.imgur.com/Om8Cuq2.png)

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤWe recommend pairing with jei for a better experience


ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ![ABOUT CYBORG ROBOT CHICKEN RETURNS MOD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/becdb9952d4d807fe84c02fefb7a9e957f15cd99.png)

_In a different Timeline, a chicken was able to stand against players and put an end to the endless suffering they cause to millions of chickens. And so eventually a interdimensional empire was forged, no crime commited against chickens will go unpunished!_


![CYBORG ROBOT CHICKEN GIF1](https://i.imgur.com/pDC67D3.gif)
Taking the life of infant chickens will get you a notoriety level that will allow chicken robots to hunt you down
The higher your notoriety level the stronger the troops hunting you down will be!

![CYBORG ROBOT CHICKEN GIF 2](https://i.imgur.com/Hcq6QHA.gif)
Being hunted down by a cyborg robot chicken from the future is not all downsides however.
Defeated robot chickens will yield all sorts of components that can be used to enhance yourself
in many different ways, experiment with different implants and see what you like best!


When you've had enough of being hunted down, craft a temporal rift opener and confront your pursuer, however you might want to enhance yourself first, he won't go down without a fight. In his timeline he alone triumphed against the might of players.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ![ROADMAP CRC Cyborg Robot Chicken](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d6e2f7db8161c3e6a78b24682646302c54e8362.png)

If the mod does well we plan to add various features some of them being:

-Pilotable Chicken Rex, your own machine of total destruction

-Explorable Chicken-Topia, see how a timeline where cyborg chickens rule the overworld

-More implants, new arms, eyes and crazy organs with strange gimmicks
